hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

buttons.primary: bg-yellow-500 text-black font-bold hover:bg-yellow-400 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(234,179,8,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(234,179,8,0.5)] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-blue-500 text-white font-bold hover:bg-blue-400 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.glass: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors

cards.glass_panel: bg-[#121215]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden
cards.achievement_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-yellow-500/10 to-transparent border border-yellow-500/30 rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:border-yellow-500/60 transition-all
cards.metric_card: bg-[#1A1A1E] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 flex items-start justify-between

progress_bars.xp_bar: h-4 bg-zinc-900 rounded-full overflow-hidden relative shadow-inner border border-white/5
progress_bars.xp_fill: h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-500 to-yellow-300 relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[length:20px_20px] before:bg-[linear-gradient(45deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.15)_25%,transparent_25%,transparent_50%,rgba(255,255,255,0.15)_50%,rgba(255,255,255,0.15)_75%,transparent_75%,transparent)] before:animate-[move-bg_1s_linear_infinite] shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(234,179,8,0.5)]

badges.rank_gold: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-500 border border-yellow-500/30
badges.rank_blue: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30
badges.status_active: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30

animations.confetti: canvas-confetti package. Trigger fire() on achievement unlock, level up, or goal completion. Use gold (#EAB308) and blue (#3B82F6) colors.
animations.page_transition: Framer Motion: <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 15 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }} />
animations.streak_flame: Framer Motion: animate scale [1, 1.1, 1] and opacity for a pulsing effect on the streak flame icon.
animations.progress_fill: Framer Motion: initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${percentage}%` }} transition={{ duration: 1, ease: 'easeOut' }}

icons.usage: Use Duotone weight for active/achieved states (gives that premium 2-tone look), Regular or Light for inactive. Examples: Sword, ShieldStar, Trophy, Fire (for streak), Target, TrendUp.

image_urls.description: Dark geometric texture. Use as a subtle background pattern with low opacity (e.g. 5%) across the app to break flatness.
Dark neon blue abstract. Perfect for the Auth hero background or the Leaderboard banner background with a dark gradient overlay.

Auth.layout: Mobile: Stacked. Desktop: Split screen (Left: Branding/Gamified Value Prop over auth_hero_background + black/50 overlay. Right: Glass UI Login/Signup Form).

MemberDashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Top/Hero: User Level + XP Bar + Streak Flame. Middle: Bento Grid (Daily Check-in, Next Achievement, Mini-Leaderboard). Bottom: Upcoming Follow-ups.

ProspectingTracker.layout: Data Dense layout. Header with Stats (Total, Won, Lost). Below: Tabs for Pipeline/List. Main: Drag-Drop Kanban or clear Data Table.

FollowUpTracker.layout: List View grouped by date. Clear red/yellow/green indicators for urgency.
features: Action buttons per row (Mark Done, Reschedule)

AttendanceTracker.layout: Calendar grid or upcoming events list.

ChallengesLeaderboard.layout: Top: Podium UI for top 3 users (Avatars with Gold/Silver/Bronze borders). Bottom: List of ranks 4-10.

Profile.layout: Centered large Avatar surrounded by a circular XP progress ring. Below: Grid of unlocked and locked badges (locked are grayscale/opacity-50).

AdminPanel.layout: Sidebar navigation (Desktop), Hamburger/Bottom nav (Mobile). Data-heavy tables.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react canvas-confetti framer-motion @radix-ui/react-icons clsx tailwind-merge`.
Implement Shadcn components: button, card, input, form, checkbox, dialog, tabs, table, progress, avatar, badge.
Setup routing (react-router-dom) with a layout wrapper that includes a bottom-nav for mobile (Mobile First!) and a sidebar for desktop.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000), use the defined #050507 tinted black base.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, check-ins) have `data-testid` attributes in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='daily-checkin-btn').
For typography, include the Google Fonts for 'Unbounded' and 'Manrope' in index.html.
Use framer-motion for page transitions and micro-interactions (hover, tap, progress bar fill).
Integrate canvas-confetti specifically on the 'Daily Check-in' button and 'Achievement Unlock' events.
Do not generate empty placeholder pages. Populate them with functional, production-ready layouts, forms, and tables using Shadcn.
